content.fact: v0.9 ship should be paired with an outreach wave: simultaneous PRs to openclaude and cline adding MCP config examples for MOM. With MCP server, PRs add a config entry (zero code from their side) — low friction for merge. Silent rebrand to MOM before outreach. Blog post 'Connect MOM to any MCP runtime in 5 minutes'. Push on HN/LinkedIn/Twitter. User quote: 'virar a chave e começar a atacar ao invés de esperar que as pessoas cheguem'.
content.why: Openclaude (22.5k stars) and Cline (open-source, deep integration) are strategic targets. Using their community size for MOM awareness at near-zero cost. MCP config entry = zero code for maintainers = low merge friction vs asking them to implement MRP.
